description_long: This cash register features a robust, angular black body with a prominent red-framed display unit at the top center. The display appears to be an older, monochrome CRT-style screen, flanked by a small keypad or control panel on the left and a metallic tray or input area below. The main body is wide and blocky, with a recessed central section for user interaction and a flat top surface suitable for placing small items. The sides and rear are solid and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The overall appearance suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in busy urban retail or service environments.
description: A sturdy, black cash register with a red-framed CRT-style display and metallic input tray, designed for urban retail use. Its angular, blocky form emphasizes durability and practicality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red-framed display, metallic tray, and small keypad on the left, with the recessed interaction area clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the display unit and the solid, blocky side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid black back and the red display housing protruding above the main body.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, emphasizing the thickness of the body and the display's rear profile.
attribute_keypad_layout: small rectangular keypad, likely numeric, positioned to the left of the display
